verified_source_contracts: FeedItem model with 15 fields (feed_id, source_type, source_label, data_mode, title, body, url, assets, published_at, ingested_at, freshness, event_type, intensity, dedup_group, original_id)
JSONL format from data/benchmark/ and results/
inferred_contracts: Telegram message shape from publisher code (message_id, chat_id, text, date)
CACHED data_mode — referenced in renderer badges but not in FeedDataMode enum
missing_contracts: monitor_events — no function with this name exists
Flash live input path (JSONL/SQLite) — only fixtures exist
Telegram incoming message DB (tdata/) — not in repo
implemented_readers: FlashReader — reads JSON/JSONL from injected path
NewsReader — reads JSON/JSONL/CSV from injected path
TelegramReader — reads SQLite read-only from injected path

aggregate.error_isolation: single reader failure does not block others

fixture_live_truth.reader_live_items: determined by injected data (test = 2-10 per reader)

read_only_sqlite_proof: TelegramReader uses URI ?mode=ro + PRAGMA query_only; write attempts fail with OperationalError; verified by test_20_sqlite_read_only
limitations: No real live flash input path exists in repo — FlashReader requires injected path
No Telegram message DB contract — TelegramReader reads sent-state SQLite
CACHED data_mode not in FeedDataMode enum — use LIVE + health metadata
Reader is one-shot synchronous only — no streaming or polling support
No production paths hardcoded — all paths must be injected
Existing_feed_readers_not_wired remains for Integration until readers connected there
